TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alonzo_Bradley, title = Alonzo_Bradley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alonzo_Bradley} }

S.FORM: Alonzo Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Alonzo Bradley, biru na p'unro. qnxan nya Bradley htagan beh sa misisipico yotica.sraral ga cyux hopa pqwasan biru ptlubuw. 1977-1980 kawas hiya ga maki Amerika NBA Houston Rockets moyay 99 qnahan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Alonzo Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Alonzo Bradley, biru na p'unro. qnxan nya Bradley htagan beh sa misisipico yotica.sraral ga cyux hopa pqwasan biru ptlubuw. 1977-1980 kawas hiya ga maki Amerika NBA Houston Rockets moyay 99 qnahan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alonzo βra*lej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, alonzo βra*lej, βiru na pʔunro. qnxan nja βra*lej ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa mis~ɕis~ɕipiʦ~ʨo jotiʦ~ʨa.s~ɕraral ɣa ʦ~ʨjux ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru ptluβuw. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa maki amerika nβa ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ mojaj ** qnaħan. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
